news.headline: Trump threatens to strike world's largest gas field if Iran attacks Qatar again
news.summary: US President Donald Trump pledged the US would “massively blow up the entirety” of the world’s largest gas field if Iran attacks Qatar again. Trump made his threat on social media Wednesday night against Iran’s South Pars natural gas field after Iranian missiles hit Qatar. The Iranian attack was in

news.headline: Who is running Iran? Top leadership decimated by US-Israeli strikes
news.summary: Iran suffered a fresh blow Wednesday with the killing of its intelligence minister as the new supreme leader, yet to be seen since replacing his slain father, vowed to avenge the death of the country's security chief.
